cross_fitted_item_difficulty_floor_0.30.description: Each FM trace is residualized against per-case difficulty estimated from traces outside that FM's broad upstream family; the original within/cross family-pair rule is then recomputed on residuals.
cross_fitted_item_difficulty_floor_0.30.within_cross_family_rule: paper primary rule: same FM plus DINOv2-B/S pair
